caption: In a studio setting filled with framed photographs and clothing racks, a man is recorded for a podcast. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and large over-ear headphones. He also wears a tall, grey, textured wig. A professional microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring the text "TALK" and "PODCAST" on the left, and another logo that reads "TALK JOY" on the right. Across the sequence, the man remains seated, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions while looking toward someone off-camera. The background remains static, showcasing various images and apparel items, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. The man's posture and the camera angle remain consistent throughout the scene.
